attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 'Workgroup Hierarchy validation'AS VALIDATION_TYPE,
'New Workgroup from current month' AS VALIDATION_SUB_TYPE,
'New Work Group' NAME,
'current month vs prior month' Criteria,
'Post Month End' Phase,
CURRENT_DATE AS VALIDATED_DATE,
(SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
WG_NAME,THEATER,DELIVERY_CHANNEL FROM (
SELECT WG_NAME,THEATER,DELIVERY_CHANNEL FROM $$ETLONLYDB.EL_CCM_TAC_WORKGROUP where FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT =
(SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
MINUS 
SELECT WG_NAME,THEATER,DELIVERY_CHANNEL FROM $$ETLONLYDB.EL_CCM_TAC_WORKGROUP where FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT =
(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID))) A
attributes.Pre SQL: DELETE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_HMP_AUDIT WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = (SELECT  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_FISCAL_MONTH_CTRL) AND PHASE='Post Month End';

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
'C3BL Driver Datasets'AS VALIDATION_TYPE,
'Repair' AS VALIDATION_SUB_TYPE,
'Record Count Tieout' NAME,
'Rolling 6 Months Average' Criteria,
'Post Month End' Phase,
CURRENT_DATE AS VALIDATED_DATE,
B.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,COUNT(DISTINCT ITEM) PID_COUNT
,(SELECT AVG(PID_COUNT_AVG) REPAIR_PID_COUNT_AVG
FROM(
SELECT RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,COUNT(DISTINCT ITEM) PID_COUNT_AVG
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_REPAIR_ORDER A
INNER JOIN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_AGE+1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=200101) -FISCAL_MONTH_AGE AS FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR) B ON B.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = A.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RF ON RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = B.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE RF.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE BETWEEN 2 AND 7
GROUP BY 1)PID_AVG) REPAIR_PID_COUNT_AVG
,PID_COUNT - REPAIR_PID_COUNT_AVG AS DIFF
,0.1 TOLERANCE_DIFF
,CAST(DIFF AS DECIMAL(12,6)) /REPAIR_PID_COUNT_AVG AS DIFF_PCT
,CASE WHEN ABS(DIFF_PCT)> TOLERANCE_DIFF THEN 'FAIL' ELSE 'PASS' END FINAL_RESULT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_REPAIR_ORDER A
INNER JOIN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_AGE+1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=200101) -FISCAL_MONTH_AGE AS FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR) B ON B.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = A.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RF ON RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = B.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE RF.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE = 1 GROUP BY 7

SELECT 'C3BL Driver Datasets'AS VALIDATION_TYPE
,'QOH' AS VALIDATION_SUB_TYPE
,'Trend by delivery theater' NAME
,'Rolling 6 Months Average' Criteria
,'Post Month End' Phase
,CURRENT_DATE AS VALIDATED_DATE
,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,CURR.THEATER
,INV_COST_AMT CURR_AMT
,INV_COST_AMT_AVG AS AVG_AMT
,CURR_AMT-AVG_AMT AS DIFF
,0.1 TOLERANCE_DIFF
,DIFF /NULLIF(AVG_AMT,0) DIFF_PCT
,CASE WHEN ABS(DIFF_PCT)> TOLERANCE_DIFF THEN 'FAIL' ELSE 'PASS' END FINAL_RESULT
FROM (SELECT B.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,THEATER, SUM(INV_COST_AMT) AS INV_COST_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_QOH_DRIVER A
INNER JOIN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_AGE+1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=200101) -FISCAL_MONTH_AGE AS FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR) B ON B.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = A.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RF ON RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = B.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE RF.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE = 1
GROUP BY 1,2) CURR

INNER JOIN (SELECT THEATER, AVG(INV_COST_AMT) INV_COST_AMT_AVG
FROM(
SELECT RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT, THEATER, SUM(INV_COST_AMT) AS INV_COST_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_QOH_DRIVER A
INNER JOIN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_AGE+1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=200101) -FISCAL_MONTH_AGE AS FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR) B ON B.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = A.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RF ON RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = B.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE RF.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE BETWEEN 2 AND 7
GROUP BY 1,2    
)INV_COST_AMT_AVG GROUP BY 1) AVRG
ON CURR.THEATER=AVRG.THEATER

SELECT 'Excel Driver files for GSLO Validation'AS VALIDATION_TYPE,
'DUTY VAT CIV Validation' AS VALIDATION_SUB_TYPE,
'File upload check' NAME,
'prior month vs current month' Criteria,
'Post Month End' Phase,
CURRENT_DATE AS VALIDATED_DATE,
CTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
CASE WHEN RFDY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <=1 AND RFDY.WORKDAY_IN_FISCAL_MTD_COUNT <=1 THEN 'New File Uploaed' ELse 'File is not uploaded for current_month' END FILE_UPLOAD_FLG,
COUNT(1) AS CUR_MTH_COUNT,
(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_DUTY_VAT_BY_COUNTRY 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT= (SELECT PREV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_FISCAL_MONTH_CTRL CTRL ON CTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = RFDY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT GROUP BY 1 ))PREV_MTH_COUNT,
0.100 AS TOLERANCE_DIFF,
CAST(CUR_MTH_COUNT-PREV_MTH_COUNT AS DECIMAL(12,6))/CUR_MTH_COUNT DIFF_PCT,
CASE WHEN ABS(DIFF_PCT)> TOLERANCE_DIFF THEN 'FAIL' ELSE 'PASS' END FINAL_RESULT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_DUTY_VAT_BY_COUNTRY DUTY_VAT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDY
ON DUTY_VAT.EDW_CREATE_DTM=RFDY.CALENDAR_DATE
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_FISCAL_MONTH_CTRL CTRL
ON CTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = RFDY.PREV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
GROUP BY 7,8
attributes.Pre SQL: DELETE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_EXCEL_DRIVER_GSLO_AUDIT WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = (SELECT  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_FISCAL_MONTH_CTRL) AND PHASE='Post Month End';

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 'ACTS Worktime validation'AS VALIDATION_TYPE,
'ACTS minutes measurement' AS VALIDATION_SUB_TYPE,
'Work Theater  Delivery Channel with ACTS but no GL $' NAME,
'Having Worktime and 0 GL $' Criteria,
'Post Month End' Phase,
CURRENT_DATE AS VALIDATED_DATE,
COGS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
WORK_THEATER ,
DELIVERY_CHANNEL,
SUM(COALESCE(ACOD,0.00)) WORK_TIME,
COUNT(DISTINCT SR_NUMBER)
FROM $$STGDB.WI_EDW_TAC_COGS COGS
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID CTRL 
ON COGS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
WHERE (
(WORK_THEATER ,COALESCE(DELIVERY_CHANNEL,'UNK')) IN
(SELECT THEATER,COALESCE(DELIVERY_CHANNEL,'UNK') FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_COST_CENTER CCM
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID CTRL 
ON CCM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
GROUP BY 1,2 HAVING SUM(COALESCE(TAC_COST,0.00))=0)
OR 
(WORK_THEATER ,COALESCE(DELIVERY_CHANNEL,'UNK')) NOT IN
(SELECT THEATER,COALESCE(DELIVERY_CHANNEL,'UNK') FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_COST_CENTER CCM
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID CTRL 
ON CCM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
GROUP BY 1,2) 
)
GROUP BY 7,8,9 HAVING SUM(COALESCE(ACOD,0.00))>0
attributes.Pre SQL: DELETE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ACTS_WORKTIME_GL_VALIDATION WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = (SELECT  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_FISCAL_MONTH_CTRL) AND PHASE='Post Month End';

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  'TS COGS - SR Inclusion'AS VALIDATION_TYPE,
'SR Inclusion Dates' AS VALIDATION_SUB_TYPE,
'Catchup SR PCT' NAME,
'PCT of PREV MTH SR' Criteria,
'Post Month End' Phase,
CURRENT_DATE AS VALIDATED_DATE,
CATCHUP_SR.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,
CATCHUP_SR_COUNT,
CURR_SR_COUNT,
0.0100 AS TOLERANCE_DIFF,
CAST(CATCHUP_SR_COUNT AS DECIMAL(12,6))/CURR_SR_COUNT DIFF_PCT,
CASE WHEN ABS(DIFF_PCT)> TOLERANCE_DIFF THEN 'FAIL' ELSE 'PASS' END FINAL_RESULT 
FROM
(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID,SR_COUNT AS CATCHUP_SR_COUNT FROM 
(SELECT A.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,B.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT SHIP_MONTH,COUNT(DISTINCT SR_NUMBER) AS SR_COUNT 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_VOLUME_FACT A
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  B
ON A.CLOSE_DATE BETWEEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
WHERE A.FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
GROUP BY 1,2) A
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY FISCAL_MONTH_ID ORDER BY SHIP_MONTH ASC) = 1) CATCHUP_SR
INNER JOIN (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID,SR_COUNT AS CURR_SR_COUNT FROM 
(SELECT A.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,B.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT SHIP_MONTH,COUNT(DISTINCT SR_NUMBER) AS SR_COUNT 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_VOLUME_FACT A
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  B
ON A.CLOSE_DATE BETWEEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
WHERE A.FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
GROUP BY 1,2) A
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY FISCAL_MONTH_ID ORDER BY SHIP_MONTH ASC) <> 1) CURR_SR
ON CATCHUP_SR.FISCAL_MONTH_ID=CURR_SR.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
attributes.Pre SQL: DELETE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SR_RMA_CATCHUP_VALIDATION WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = (SELECT  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_FISCAL_MONTH_CTRL) AND PHASE='Post Month End';

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
'C3BL Driver Datasets'AS VALIDATION_TYPE,
'Repair' AS VALIDATION_SUB_TYPE,
'Unit Price Per PID' NAME,
'Rolling 6 Months Average' Criteria,
'Post Month End' Phase,
CURRENT_DATE AS VALIDATED_DATE,
 A.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,A.PID
,0.1 TOLERANCE_DIFF_PERCENTAGE
,CAST (A.QUANTITY AS DECIMAL (18,6)) CURR_QUANTITY
,CAST (B.AVG_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL (18,6)) AVG_QUANTITY
,CURR_QUANTITY - AVG_QUANTITY AS QTY_DIFF
,QTY_DIFF /NULLIF(AVG_QUANTITY,0) QTY_DIFF_PCT
,CASE WHEN ABS(QTY_DIFF_PCT)> TOLERANCE_DIFF_PERCENTAGE THEN 'FAIL' ELSE 'PASS' END QTY_RESULT
,CAST (A.UNIT_PRICE AS DECIMAL (18,6)) CURR_UNIT_PRICE
,CAST (B.AVG_UNIT_PRICE AS DECIMAL (18,6)) AVG_UNIT_PRICE
,CURR_UNIT_PRICE - AVG_UNIT_PRICE AS UNIT_PRICE_DIFF
,UNIT_PRICE_DIFF /NULLIF(AVG_UNIT_PRICE,0) UNIT_PRICE_DIFF_PCT
,CASE WHEN ABS(UNIT_PRICE_DIFF_PCT)> TOLERANCE_DIFF_PERCENTAGE THEN 'FAIL' ELSE 'PASS' END UNIT_PRICE_RESULT
,CAST (A.PID_COST AS DECIMAL (18,6)) CURR_COST
,CAST (B.REPAIR_PID_COST_AVG AS DECIMAL (18,6)) AVG_COST
,CURR_COST - AVG_COST AS COST_DIFF
,COST_DIFF /NULLIF(AVG_COST,0) COST_DIFF_PCT
,CASE WHEN ABS(COST_DIFF_PCT)> TOLERANCE_DIFF_PERCENTAGE THEN 'FAIL' ELSE 'PASS' END COST_RESULT
FROM (
SELECT B.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,ITEM AS PID, SUM(VALUE_1) AS PID_COST,SUM(QUANTITY) AS QUANTITY,MAX(COST) AS UNIT_PRICE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_REPAIR_ORDER A
INNER JOIN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_AGE+1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=200101) -FISCAL_MONTH_AGE AS FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR) B ON B.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = A.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RF ON RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = B.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE RF.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE = 1
GROUP BY 1,2
) A
INNER JOIN (SELECT PID, AVG(PID_COST) REPAIR_PID_COST_AVG,AVG(QUANTITY) AS AVG_QUANTITY,AVG(UNIT_PRICE) AS AVG_UNIT_PRICE
FROM(
SELECT RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT, ITEM AS PID, SUM(VALUE_1) AS PID_COST, SUM(QUANTITY) AS QUANTITY,MAX(COST) AS UNIT_PRICE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_REPAIR_ORDER A
INNER JOIN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_AGE+1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=200101) -FISCAL_MONTH_AGE AS FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR) B ON B.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = A.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RF ON RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = B.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE RF.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE BETWEEN 2 AND 7
GROUP BY 1,2    
)PID_AVG
GROUP BY 1) B ON A.PID=B.PID
